name: alex-harness
description: Personal SDLC harness — /helix is the only entrypoint, orchestrating a1-a8 + code-review + meta-audit phases under a Ralph passes contract. v0.7.2 adds code-review quality phase (5-dim 0-25: quality/security/performance/readability/testability) at Step 8.5 with soft-fail semantics, alongside meta-audit's binary gate at Step 9.5.
